title: Add mask and unmask option to --security-opt
body:
Add the mask and unmask option to the --security-opt flag
to allow users to specify paths to mask and unmask in the
container. If unmask=ALL, this will unmask all the paths we
mask by default.

Fixes https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7537
Partially fixes https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7801

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

-->

comments.body: For Docker compat maybe you'd want to have `--security-opt systempaths=unconfined` map to `--security-opt unmask=ALL`? Otherwise this LGTM.

@umohnani8 Once this is merged lets get this feature into containers.conf.
@umohnani8 your latest update made the tests angry....
:sob: the tests are angry because I dropped `/sys/dev` from the default list of masked paths. That is what we want to do right @rhatdan ?
